Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: I built a site that maps the web from a bounty hunter's perspective 34 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Microbenchmarking Chipsets for Giggles 50 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. VNDB founder Yorhel has died 167 upvotes, 25 comments
  4. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 579 upvotes, 119 comments
  5. Quantization from the Ground Up 73 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. My Astrophotography in the Movie Project Hail Mary 508 upvotes, 143 comments
  7. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 426 upvotes, 119 comments
  8. Flighty Airports 486 upvotes, 165 comments
  9. Building a coding agent in Swift from scratch 52 upvotes, 12 comments
  10. Slovenian officials blame Israeli firm Black Cube for trying to manipulate vote 389 upvotes, 165 comments
  11. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 407 upvotes, 174 comments
  12. Tracy Kidder has died 89 upvotes, 31 comments
  13. Meta and YouTube Found Negligent in Landmark Social Media Addiction Case 197 upvotes, 82 comments
  14. Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church 61 upvotes, 20 comments
  15. Ensu – Ente’s Local LLM app 288 upvotes, 131 comments
  16. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 882 upvotes, 465 comments
  17. Antimatter has been transported for the first time 223 upvotes, 110 comments
  18. Apple Business 706 upvotes, 401 comments
  19. Thoughts on slowing the fuck down 373 upvotes, 209 comments
  20. Sony V. Cox Decision Reversed 117 upvotes, 63 comments
  21. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 297 upvotes, 184 comments
  22. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 157 upvotes, 96 comments
  23. Goodbye to Sora 1023 upvotes, 755 comments
  24. Arm AGI CPU 403 upvotes, 288 comments
  25. UK total wind generation record beaten today 29 upvotes, 14 comments
  26. Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines 119 upvotes, 111 comments
  27. Data centers are transitioning from AC to DC 260 upvotes, 314 comments
  28. Ball Pit 6 upvotes, 2 comments
  29. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 246 upvotes, 342 comments
  30. Jury finds Meta liable in case over child sexual exploitation on its platforms 185 upvotes, 399 comments

Last generated 3:30am, 26 March 2026. Source here.
